Questions 139-142 refer to the following article.
Small Business Costs: An Overview for Beginners
There are two main kinds of costs. Variable costs are one kind; they include staff wages or the
cost of supplies. ------- costs are considered fixed. These include such things as rent payments 
i oy.
and property taxes.
A third kind of cost is called an opportunity cost. You incur an opportunity cost whenever you 
make a decision to do one specific thing - choosing some alternative option. This cost refers 
to the lost opportunities you could have benefited from had you made a different choice. Careful
consideration of potential opportunity costs is important. Ideally this should-------decision
141.
making.
-------. You should consult a licensed accountant for a more complete understanding.
